payload.description:
Feature: Score champion version timeline reports

Scenario: A report author requests champion transitions for a scorecard
Given a scorecard has score versions with championHistory metadata
When a ScoreChampionVersionTimeline report block runs for a selected time window
Then the report shows only champion transitions whose enteredAt falls inside that window
And it includes available feedback and regression evaluation metrics for each champion version
And it includes a diff from the previous champion before the first in-window transition to the latest in-window champion.
payload.title: Report authors can inspect champion version progress over time
